2605.30126.title: PARCEL: Pool-Anchored Resampling with Conditioned Elastic Queries for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding
2605.30126.paper_summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) map visual inputs into dense token sequences, imposing a quadratic computational bottleneck for inference. Elastic visual-token compression addresses this by training a single model that can run at multiple visual-token budgets. However, existing approaches struggle under aggressive compression. Spatial-only compression, as in nested pooling, behaves as an imperfect low-pass filter and induces spectral aliasing that obscures fine-grained detail. Query-only compression, as in nested query resampling, replaces explicit grid-aligned tokens with non-local summaries and substantially degrades spatial grounding. To resolve this representational conflict, we introduce PARCEL (Pool-Anchored Resampling with Conditioned Elastic Queries for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding), a visual tokenization architecture that dynamically partitions the labor of feature extraction. PARCEL establishes spatial pool tokens as low-frequency layout anchors and conditions elastic query tokens on these anchors through Pool-Conditioned Query Resampling. This encourages query tokens to focus on complementary visual features rather than redundant spatial mapping. Extensive evaluations across 27 benchmarks show that PARCEL improves the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier, consistently outperforming existing matryoshka baselines across visual-token budgets while preserving the "train once, deploy anywhere" paradigm.
2605.30126.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言模型（LVLMs）將視覺輸入映射為密集的標記序列，這對推理造成了二次計算瓶頸。彈性視覺標記壓縮通過訓練一個可以在多個視覺標記預算下運行的單一模型來解決這一問題。然而，現有的方法在激進壓縮下表現不佳。僅空間壓縮，如嵌套池化，表現為不完美的低通濾波器，並引起頻譜混疊，模糊了細微的細節。僅查詢壓縮，如嵌套查詢重採樣，將顯式的網格對齊標記替換為非局部摘要，並顯著降低了空間基礎。為了解決這一表示衝突，我們引入了PARCEL（基於池的重採樣與條件彈性查詢以實現高效的視覺-語言理解），這是一種視覺標記化架構，動態劃分特徵提取的工作。PARCEL將空間池標記建立為低頻佈局錨點，並通過池條件查詢重採樣對這些錨點進行條件化彈性查詢標記。這鼓勵查詢標記專注於互補的視覺特徵，而不是冗餘的空間映射。對27個基準的廣泛評估顯示，PARCEL改善了性能-效率的Pareto邊界，始終在視覺標記預算下超越現有的俄羅斯套娃基準，同時保持“訓練一次，隨處部署”的範式。
2605.30126.author: Selim Kuzucu et.al.
2605.30126.authors: Selim Kuzucu, Alessio Tonioni, Vasile Lup, Bernt Schiele, Federico Tombari, Muhammad Ferjad Naeem
